events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求输出一个JSON，包含关于form build & bracing的现场检查。场景：正在施工，支撑/斜撑不足以承受浇筑压力。参考ACI 347。我们要识别安全危害、严重性、需要立即采取的控制措施。

决策：因为支撑不足，这是不安全的，所以应该是 fail。风险：可能高或严重。由于是正在进行的施工，支撑不足可能导致坍塌，造成人员伤亡，所以风险应该是 critical 或 high。考虑到是浇筑压力，可能立即发生危险，所以critical。

工作阶段：in-progress （题目说 actively in progress）。组件状况：installed-defective, non-compliant。完成百分比：估计一个数字？可能已经完成了部分搭建但支撑不足，可能接近完成但尚未浇筑，比如50%？没有具体说明，我们可以给一个合理估计，比如搭建了模板但支撑不足，也许完成了70%？但安全起见，百分数不重要。value：没有数值，可以设为0。confidence：高置信度。findings：列出缺陷，如支撑/斜撑数量不足、未按ACI 347要求抵抗侧压力。actions：立即停止工作，增加支撑或斜撑，按ACI 347设计。rationale：简要解释。references：ACI 347。

输出JSON。注意不要包含多余文本。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing/kickers to resist anticipated pour pressure",
    "Formwork does not comply with ACI 347 minimum lateral pressure requirements",
    "Potential for catastrophic formwork failure during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all concrete placement and personnel access to the area",
    "Install additional bracing/kickers designed per ACI 347 to safely resist expected lateral pressure",
    "Inspect and verify all connections, ties, and shores before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Observed bracing is insufficient for the design pour pressure, presenting an imminent collapse hazard. Work must be halted and the formwork re-braced per ACI 347 before proceeding.",
  "references": ["ACI 347-14: Guide to Formwork for Concrete"]
}
